challenge.title: Korak 11
challenge.description: Nakon pronalaženja poslednjeg čvora, morate priložiti novi čvor na njega. Da biste to uradili, postavite current.next na node ispod petlje while, ali i dalje unutar klauzule else.

challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: You should set current.next to node under your while loop.

challengeFiles.name: script
